title: Yadagirigutta Temple
tagline: Yadagirigutta Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: The Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple or Yadadri or Yadagiri Gutta Devasthanam (YGD), or Pancha Narasimha Kshetram or Rishi Aradhana Kshetram is a Hindu Temple situated on a hillo
overview.description: The Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple or Yadadri or Yadagiri Gutta Devasthanam (YGD), or Pancha Narasimha Kshetram or Rishi Aradhana Kshetram is a Hindu Temple situated on a hillock in the small town of Yadagirigutta in the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. Yadadri Temple is touted as Telangana's own Tirupati. The Temple is dedicated to the god Narasimha, an Avatar of Vishnu. The temple was expanded and rebuilt between 2016 and March 2022.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Yadagirigutta
topPlaces.description: Yadagirigutta is a census town in Alair Assembly constituency of Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is a temple town as the famous Lakshmi Narasimha Temple is situated here.

topPlaces.name: Surendrapuri
topPlaces.description: Surendrapuri is a religious tourism destination located near Hyderabad, Telangana, India in the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district. The 17-acre religious complex includes the Kunda Satyanarayana Kaladhamam - India's first mythological museum, Panchamukha Hanumadeeswara Devasthanam (Hindu temple), Navagraha temples, Nagakoti idol, and Surendrapuri’s iconic two-sided Panchamukha Hanuman-Shiva statue.

topPlaces.name: Saidapur
topPlaces.description: Saidapur is a village in Saidapur mandal of Karimnagar district in the state of Telangana in India, near Huzurabad.

topPlaces.name: Jammapur
topPlaces.description: Jammapur is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

topPlaces.name: Muthireddigudem
topPlaces.description: Muthireddigudem is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

topPlaces.name: Raigiri
topPlaces.description: Raigiri is a village of Bhuvanagiri mandal and also falls under Bhongir Municipality in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district in the state of Telangana, India. There is a railway station in this village between Secunderabad, Bhuvanagiri and Kazipet, Warangal under South Central Railway.

topPlaces.name: Hanumapur
topPlaces.description: Hanumapur is a village in Bhongir mandal, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Balampally
topPlaces.description: Balampally is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Yadagirigutta Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Yadagirigutta Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Yadagirigutta Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Yadagirigutta Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Yadagirigutta Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Yadagirigutta Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Yadagirigutta Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Yadagirigutta Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yadagirigutta, Surendrapuri, Saidapur, Jammapur, Muthireddigudem.
